rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.155 governs campaign finance reporting schedules for committees. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: As an alternative to filing reports under Sections 254.153 and 254.154, a general-purpose committee may file monthly reports.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict analysis applicable.
